title: Carefree
lyrics:
Carefree, wherever we may be,
We are the famous CFC,
Strongly we will follow,
Wherever they may be,
We will not be moved,
From our old familiar home on the banks of the River Thames.
description: Chelsea's best-known terrace song, sung home and away to declare loyalty to the club.

title: Blue is the Colour
lyrics:
Blue is the colour, football is the game,
We're all together and winning is our aim,
So cheer us on through the sun and rain,
'Cause Chelsea, Chelsea is our name.
So cheer us on through the sun and rain,
'Cause Chelsea, Chelsea is our name.
description: Official Chelsea club song written by Daniel O'Donnell; played before home matches at Stamford Bridge.

title: Celery
lyrics:
Celery, celery,
If she don't come I'll stalk her,
Up to the shed,
Stand her on her head,
Keep the dampers down,
The blue flag flying, we're all off to Stamford Bridge.
description: Historic Chelsea terrace chant; supporters often throw celery (now banned) during the song.

title: Ten Men Went to Mow
lyrics:
Ten men went to mow, went to mow a meadow,
Heigh ho! The derry-o, ten men went to mow.
Nine men went to mow, went to mow a meadow,
Heigh ho! The derry-o, nine men went to mow.
Eight men went to mow, went to mow a meadow,
Heigh ho! The derry-o, eight men went to mow.
description: Traditional counting song sung in the Shed End; counts down from ten men to one.

title: Keep the Blue Flag Flying High
lyrics:
Keep the blue flag flying high,
High up in the sky,
Keep the blue flag flying high,
For Chelsea, for Chelsea.
description: Classic Chelsea terrace song celebrating the club's blue colours and identity.

title: We All Follow Chelsea
lyrics:
We all follow Chelsea,
Over land and sea and Leicester,
We all follow Chelsea,
On to victory.
description: Core Chelsea call-and-response chant declaring support home and away.

title: London is Blue
lyrics:
London is blue, London is blue,
Tottenham Hotspur, you're in Division Two,
Oh London is blue, London is blue,
Arsenal go to pieces, QPR are shite.
description: Terrace song asserting Chelsea's dominance in London and taunting local rivals.

title: Allez Allez Allez
lyrics:
Allez, allez, allez,
We are Chelsea, super Chelsea,
Allez, allez, allez.
description: Adapted terrace chant popular at Stamford Bridge during European and domestic campaigns.

title: Chelsea Chelsea
lyrics:
Chelsea, Chelsea, Chelsea, Chelsea,
Chelsea, Chelsea, Chelsea, Chelsea.
description: Simple repetitive call chant used throughout Stamford Bridge.

title: We Are Chelsea, Tra La La
lyrics:
We are Chelsea, tra la la la la,
We are Chelsea, tra la la la la la la la.
description: Simple call-and-response chant used around the ground.

title: This Is Stamford Bridge
lyrics:
This is Stamford Bridge,
This is Stamford Bridge,
No one wants to be here.
description: Chant referencing Chelsea's home ground, echoing the famous Anfield tunnel sign.

title: Stamford Bridge Is Falling Down
lyrics:
Stamford Bridge is falling down, falling down, falling down,
Stamford Bridge is falling down, my fair lady.
description: Terrace adaptation of the nursery rhyme, sung during big home nights.

title: Shed End Chant
lyrics:
We're the Shed End boys, we're the Shed End boys,
We're the Shed End boys, and we're going to make a noise.
description: Chant from the historic Shed End stand, Chelsea's traditional home end.

title: We'll Never Be Mastered
lyrics:
We'll never be mastered, never be mastered,
We'll never be mastered by you.
description: Defiant terrace chant sung by Chelsea supporters home and away.

title: One Club One Flag
lyrics:
One club, one flag, one dream,
Chelsea, Chelsea, Chelsea.
description: Modern identity chant celebrating unity among Chelsea supporters.

title: Jose Mourinho Chant
lyrics:
Jose Mourinho, Jose Mourinho,
Jose Mourinho, Jose Mourinho,
Oh, Jose Mourinho.
description: Iconic chant for Jose Mourinho during his two trophy-laden spells as Chelsea manager.

title: The Special One
lyrics:
The Special One, la la la la la,
The Special One, la la la la la la la.
description: Chant referencing Mourinho's famous 'Special One' self-description at his Chelsea unveiling.

title: Antonio Conte Chant
lyrics:
Antonio Conte, la la la la la,
Antonio Conte, he leads the Blues.
description: Tribute to Antonio Conte, who won the Premier League in his first season at Chelsea (2016-17).

title: Thomas Tuchel Chant
lyrics:
Thomas Tuchel, he leads the Blues,
Thomas Tuchel, he leads the Blues.
description: Chant for Thomas Tuchel, Chelsea manager during the 2021 Champions League triumph.

title: Gianfranco Zola
lyrics:
There's only one Gianfranco Zola, one Gianfranco Zola,
There's only one Gianfranco Zola.
description: Tribute to Gianfranco Zola, beloved Chelsea forward and later assistant manager.

title: Didier Drogba Is His Name
lyrics:
His name is Didier Drogba, he plays for Chelsea,
He scores the goals, he makes the Shed End sing,
He plays on the left, he plays on the right,
That boy Drogba makes defenders look shite.
description: Terrace tribute to Didier Drogba, Chelsea's greatest big-game striker.

title: Drogba La La La
lyrics:
Drogba, la la la la la la,
Didier Drogba, la la la la la la.
description: Simple melody chant for Didier Drogba during his two Chelsea spells.

title: Super Frank Lampard
lyrics:
Super Frank Lampard, la la la la la,
Super Frank Lampard, la la la la la la la.
description: Iconic chant for Frank Lampard, Chelsea's all-time leading goalscorer from midfield.

title: There's Only One Frank Lampard
lyrics:
There's only one Frank Lampard, one Frank Lampard,
There's only one Frank Lampard.
description: Call-and-response tribute to Frank Lampard, later Chelsea manager.

title: John Terry Leader of the Blues
lyrics:
John Terry, leader of the Blues,
John Terry, leader of the Blues.
description: Shed End chant honouring John Terry's captaincy and Chelsea loyalty.

title: There's Only One John Terry
lyrics:
There's only one John Terry, one John Terry,
There's only one John Terry.
description: Direct terrace tribute to defender and captain John Terry.

title: Eden Hazard Chant
lyrics:
Hazard, Hazard, Hazard Hazard Hazard,
Eden Hazard, Hazard Hazard Hazard.
description: Repetitive chant for Eden Hazard, Chelsea's talisman during the 2010s.

title: Hazard La La La
lyrics:
Hazard, la la la la la la,
Eden Hazard, la la la la la la.
description: Melody chant for Belgian winger Eden Hazard.

title: N'Golo Kante Chant
lyrics:
N'Golo Kante, he sits in midfield,
N'Golo Kante, he plays for Chelsea.
description: Terrace tribute to N'Golo Kante, midfield engine of two Premier League titles.

title: Kante He Runs All Day
lyrics:
Kante, Kante, N'Golo Kante,
He runs all day, he runs all day.
description: Chant celebrating Kante's extraordinary stamina and ball-winning ability.

title: Cole Palmer Chant
lyrics:
Cole Palmer, he plays for Chelsea,
Cole Palmer, he scores the goals.
description: Tribute to Cole Palmer, academy graduate and key figure in Chelsea's modern era.

title: Cold Palmer
lyrics:
Cold Palmer, Cold Palmer,
Cole Palmer, Cold Palmer.
description: Playful nickname chant for Cole Palmer, a pun on his name and composure.

title: Ashley Cole Chant
lyrics:
Ashley Cole, Ashley Cole,
Ashley Cole, Ashley Cole.
description: Chant for Ashley Cole, one of the greatest left-backs in Premier League history.

title: Petr Cech Chant
lyrics:
Petr Cech, la la la la la la la la la,
The best goalkeeper in the world.
description: Goalkeeper chant for Petr Cech, Chelsea's legendary number one.

title: Joe Cole Chant
lyrics:
Joe Cole, Joe Cole, running down the wing,
Joe Cole, Joe Cole, running down the wing.
description: Terrace song for winger Joe Cole during his Chelsea years.

title: Claude Makelele
lyrics:
Makelele, Makelele, Claude Makelele,
Makelele, Makelele, Claude Makelele.
description: Tribute to Claude Makelele, whose holding role was so influential it was named after him.

title: Michael Essien
lyrics:
Michael Essien, he plays in midfield,
Michael Essien, he plays for Chelsea.
description: Chant for Ghanaian midfielder Michael Essien, known as 'The Bison'.

title: Fernando Torres
lyrics:
Fernando Torres, he plays for Chelsea,
Fernando Torres, he scores the goals.
description: Chant for Fernando Torres, including his famous semi-final goal against Barcelona in 2012.

title: Thiago Silva Chant
lyrics:
Thiago Silva, he plays at the back,
Thiago Silva, he plays for Chelsea.
description: Chant for Brazilian centre-back Thiago Silva during his Chelsea spell.

title: Mason Mount Chant
lyrics:
Mason Mount, he wears the number ten,
Mason Mount, he plays for Chelsea.
description: Tribute to academy graduate Mason Mount, key player in the 2021 Champions League win.

title: Reece James Chant
lyrics:
Reece James, he plays right-back,
Reece James, he plays for Chelsea.
description: Chant for homegrown captain Reece James.

title: Munich 2012 Chant
lyrics:
Munich, Munich, we won it all in Munich,
Munich, Munich, we won it all in Munich.
description: Chant celebrating Chelsea's first Champions League title, won in Munich in 2012.

title: Kings of Europe 2012
lyrics:
We're the kings of Europe, kings of Europe,
Chelsea FC, we're the kings of Europe.
description: Celebration chant for Chelsea's 2012 Champions League triumph over Bayern Munich.

title: Drogba Penalty Munich
lyrics:
Drogba, Drogba, he scored in Munich,
Drogba, Drogba, he scored in Munich.
description: Chant immortalising Didier Drogba's winning penalty in the 2012 Champions League final.

title: Champions of Europe
lyrics:
Champions of Europe, champions of Europe,
Chelsea FC, champions of Europe.
description: General European celebration chant sung after 2012 and 2021 triumphs.

title: Arsenal Taunt
lyrics:
We hate Tottenham Hotspur, we hate Tottenham Hotspur,
We hate Tottenham Hotspur, but Arsenal are shite.
description: Classic Chelsea rivalry chant mocking both North London clubs.

title: Tottenham Taunt
lyrics:
What a load of shite, what a load of shite,
Tottenham Hotspur, what a load of shite.
description: Terrace taunt directed at Chelsea's North London rivals Tottenham Hotspur.

title: Liverpool Taunt (2008)
lyrics:
We won it twice at Anfield, we won it twice at Anfield,
Chelsea FC, we won it twice at Anfield.
description: Banter chant referencing Chelsea's Champions League knockouts of Liverpool at Anfield.

title: Manchester United Taunt
lyrics:
You're not singing anymore, you're not singing anymore,
You're not singing anymore, you're not singing anymore.
description: Generic taunt often directed at Manchester United at Stamford Bridge.

title: Who Are Ya
lyrics: Who are ya? Who are ya? Who are ya?
description: Generic terrace taunt used by Chelsea fans toward opposition supporters.

title: You're Not Singing Anymore
lyrics:
You're not singing anymore, you're not singing anymore,
You're not singing anymore, you're not singing anymore.
description: Taunt sung when silencing an away end at Stamford Bridge.

title: Roman Abramovich Song
lyrics:
Roman Abramovich, he eats his lunch in a solid gold bath,
Roman Abramovich, he eats his lunch in a solid gold bath.
description: Humorous terrace song about former owner Roman Abramovich during the trophy era.
